summary: This is an extremely brief post where Joel shares a testimonial from a user named Kiere who praises FogBugz as a help desk tool. The quoted user reports positive experiences after handling about 100 tickets and 45 knowledge base articles. The post is essentially a customer endorsement with no additional commentary from Joel. It serves as marketing content for Fog Creek's FogBugz product.
key_points: FogBugz was being used successfully as a help desk system, not just a bug tracker
The user highlights speed, productivity, and simplicity as key strengths
Joel used his blog as a channel to amplify customer testimonials for his own product
money_quotes: After using my new help desk system for about 100 tickets and 45 knowledge base articles, I can honestly say this has been my favorite tool yet.
key_insight: FogBugz found adoption beyond bug tracking as a general-purpose help desk tool, which Joel promoted through customer testimonials.
